name: B.E.S.T. Academy
tagline: Building Excellence in Students Today — mentoring and tutoring Atlanta's youth.
overview: The B.E.S.T. Academy committee coordinates monthly character development sessions for high school young men at B.E.S.T. Academy. Members serve as mentors and role models, investing directly in the identity, leadership, and personal development of the next generation. Every third Friday, E100 members show up – in a suit or blazer – to model excellence and pour into the young men who are next.
